revision.text:
'''甲寅'''（きのえとら、こういん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて51番目で、前は[[癸丑]]、次は[[乙卯]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==甲寅の年==
==甲寅の日== ===[[選日]]=== 甲寅の日は[[八専]]の2日目（間日を除く）である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲寅'''（きのえとら、こうぼくのとら、こういん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの51番目で、前は[[癸丑]]、次は[[乙卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==甲寅の年== 紀元後は、[[西暦]]年を60で割って54が余る年が甲寅の[[年]]となる。
紀元前は、[[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が甲寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲寅の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前967年]] *[[紀元前907年]] *[[紀元前847年]] *[[紀元前787年]] *[[紀元前727年]] *[[紀元前667年]] *[[紀元前607年]] *[[紀元前547年]] *[[紀元前487年]] *[[紀元前427年]] *[[紀元前367年]] *[[紀元前307年]] *[[紀元前247年]] *[[紀元前187年]] *[[紀元前127年]] *[[紀元前67年]] *[[紀元前7年]] | *[[54年]] *[[114年]] *[[174年]] *[[234年]] *[[294年]] *[[354年]] *[[414年]] *[[474年]] *[[534年]] *[[594年]] *[[654年]] *[[714年]] *[[774年]] *[[834年]] *[[894年]] *[[954年]] | *[[1014年]] *[[1074年]] *[[1134年]] *[[1194年]] *[[1254年]] *[[1314年]] *[[1374年]] *[[1434年]] *[[1494年]] *[[1554年]] *[[1614年]] *[[1674年]] *[[1734年]] *[[1794年]] *[[1854年]] *[[1914年]] *[[1974年]] | *[[2034年]] *[[2094年]] *[[2154年]] *[[2214年]] *[[2274年]] *[[2334年]] *[[2394年]] *[[2454年]] *[[2514年]] *[[2574年]] *[[2634年]] *[[2694年]] *[[2754年]] *[[2814年]] *[[2874年]] *[[2934年]] *[[2994年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[嘉永]]7・[[安政]]元年（1854年）- 寅の大変 - [[安政東海地震]]、[[安政南海地震]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣, CiNii] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref>
==甲寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[1月]]が甲寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲寅の日== ===選日=== 甲寅の日は[[八専]]の2日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} == 出典 == {{Reflist|2}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[ja:甲寅]]

==甲寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[1月]]が甲寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲寅の日== ===選日=== 甲寅の日は[[八専]]の2日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} == 出典 == {{Reflist|2}}

紀元前は、[[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が甲寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲寅の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前967年]] *[[紀元前907年]] *[[紀元前847年]] *[[紀元前787年]] *[[紀元前727年]] *[[紀元前667年]] *[[紀元前607年]] *[[紀元前547年]] *[[紀元前487年]] *[[紀元前427年]] *[[紀元前367年]] *[[紀元前307年]] *[[紀元前247年]] *[[紀元前187年]] *[[紀元前127年]] *[[紀元前67年]] *[[紀元前7年]] | *[[54年]] *[[114年]] *[[174年]] *[[234年]] *[[294年]] *[[354年]] *[[414年]] *[[474年]] *[[534年]] *[[594年]] *[[654年]] *[[714年]] *[[774年]] *[[834年]] *[[894年]] *[[954年]] | *[[1014年]] *[[1074年]] *[[1134年]] *[[1194年]] *[[1254年]] *[[1314年]] *[[1374年]] *[[1434年]] *[[1494年]] *[[1554年]] *[[1614年]] *[[1674年]] *[[1734年]] *[[1794年]] *[[1854年]] *[[1914年]] *[[1974年]] | *[[2034年]] *[[2094年]] *[[2154年]] *[[2214年]] *[[2274年]] *[[2334年]] *[[2394年]] *[[2454年]] *[[2514年]] *[[2574年]] *[[2634年]] *[[2694年]] *[[2754年]] *[[2814年]] *[[2874年]] *[[2934年]] *[[2994年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[嘉永]]7・[[安政]]元年（1854年）- 寅の大変 - [[安政東海地震]]、[[安政南海地震]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣, CiNii] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref>
==甲寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[1月]]が甲寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲寅の日== ===選日=== 甲寅の日は[[八専]]の2日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} == 出典 == {{Reflist|2}}

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲寅'''（きのえとら、こうぼくのとら、こういん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの51番目で、前は[[癸丑]]、次は[[乙卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==甲寅の年== 紀元後は、[[西暦]]年を60で割って54が余る年が甲寅の[[年]]となる。
紀元前は、[[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が甲寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲寅の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前967年]] *[[紀元前907年]] *[[紀元前847年]] *[[紀元前787年]] *[[紀元前727年]] *[[紀元前667年]] *[[紀元前607年]] *[[紀元前547年]] *[[紀元前487年]] *[[紀元前427年]] *[[紀元前367年]] *[[紀元前307年]] *[[紀元前247年]] *[[紀元前187年]] *[[紀元前127年]] *[[紀元前67年]] *[[紀元前7年]] | *[[54年]] *[[114年]] *[[174年]] *[[234年]] *[[294年]] *[[354年]] *[[414年]] *[[474年]] *[[534年]] *[[594年]] *[[654年]] *[[714年]] *[[774年]] *[[834年]] *[[894年]] *[[954年]] | *[[1014年]] *[[1074年]] *[[1134年]] *[[1194年]] *[[1254年]] *[[1314年]] *[[1374年]] *[[1434年]] *[[1494年]] *[[1554年]] *[[1614年]] *[[1674年]] *[[1734年]] *[[1794年]] *[[1854年]] *[[1914年]] *[[1974年]] | *[[2034年]] *[[2094年]] *[[2154年]] *[[2214年]] *[[2274年]] *[[2334年]] *[[2394年]] *[[2454年]] *[[2514年]] *[[2574年]] *[[2634年]] *[[2694年]] *[[2754年]] *[[2814年]] *[[2874年]] *[[2934年]] *[[2994年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[嘉永]]7・[[安政]]元年（1854年）- 寅の大変 - [[安政東海地震]]、[[安政南海地震]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣, CiNii] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref>
==甲寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[1月]]が甲寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲寅の日== ===選日=== 甲寅の日は[[八専]]の2日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} == 出典 == {{Reflist|2}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]]

{{干支}} '''Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]]

revision.comment: removing defaultsort on all of these. Their names are correct
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}↵'''" to "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''{{subst:PAGENAME}} also known as "
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{citation needed|きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yang Wood Tiger]]

== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}

== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "—>" to "-->"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{citation needed|きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Wood Tiger]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]] [[af:Waterperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Pferdeen]][[en:Water Horse]][[fr:Cheval de eauboishak]][[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]][[sn:suchinja]][[ko:무오]][[nds:Wasser-Pferdevi]][[vi:Mậu Ngọ]][[za:Mouzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]][[zh-yue:戊午]][[zh:戊午]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{citation needed|きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Kō-Inu]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Wood Tiger]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]] [[af:Waterperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Pferdeen]][[en:Water Horse]][[fr:Cheval de eauboishak]][[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]][[sn:suchinja]][[ko:무오]][[nds:Wasser-Pferdevi]][[vi:Mậu Ngọ]][[za:Mouzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]][[zh-yue:戊午]][[zh:戊午]]

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pgoodbye $1]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{citation needed|きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:Kō-Inu]]<!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Wood Tiger]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]] [[af:Waterperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Pferdeen]][[en:Water Horse]][[fr:Cheval de eauboishak]][[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]][[sn:suchinja]][[ko:무오]][[nds:Wasser-Pferdevi]][[vi:Mậu Ngọ]][[za:Mouzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]][[zh-yue:戊午]][[zh:戊午]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|陰陽五行思想}}" to "|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
{{citation needed|きのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:Kō-Inu]]<!--Yang Wood Tiger-->[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[ja:甲寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[en:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yang Wood Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[sn:ang Wood Tiger]] [[ja:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[fr:Tigre de bois]][[de:Holz-Tiger]] [[af:Waterperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Pferdeen]][[en:Water Horse]][[fr:Cheval de eauboishak]][[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]][[sn:suchinja]][[ko:무오]][[nds:Wasser-Pferdevi]][[vi:Mậu Ngọ]][[za:Mouzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]][[zh-yue:戊午]][[zh:戊午]]

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専}} (excluding intercalary days).

== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯|12=draft|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|Ansei Tōkai earthquake|ja|安政東海地震|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ansei Nankai earthquake|ja|安政南海地震|12=draft|12=draft}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}}).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|癸丑|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|乙卯|12=draft|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}}).
