=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
== Kinoe-tora Months == In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious == Kinoe-tora Years == After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

== Kinoe-tora Days == === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== PronounciationYang Wood Tiger \n<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

'''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[1074 AD]] *[[1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[1254 AD]] *[[1314 AD]] *[[1374 AD]] *[[1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[1494 AD]] *[[1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[1614 AD]] *[[1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

'''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|qq=}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[967 BC]] *[[907 BC]] *[[847 BC]] *[[787 BC]] *[[727 BC]] *[[667 BC]] *[[607 BC]] *[[547 BC]] *[[487 BC]] *[[427 BC]] *[[367 BC]] *[[307 BC]] *[[247 BC]] *[[187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[67 BC]] *[[7 BC]] | *[[54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[234 AD]] *[[294 AD]] *[[354 AD]] *[[414 AD]] *[[474 AD]] *[[534 AD]] *[[594 AD]] *[[654 AD]] *[[714 AD]] *[[774 AD]] *[[834 AD]] *[[894 AD]] *[[954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[1794 AD]] *[[1854 AD]] *[[1914 AD]] *[[1974 AD]] | *[[2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|qq=}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|qq=}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood
