It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *[[:en:787 BC|787 BC]] *[[:en:727 BC|727 BC]] *[[:en:667 BC|667 BC]] *[[:en:607 BC|607 BC]] *[[:en:547 BC|547 BC]] *[[:en:487 BC|487 BC]] *[[:en:427 BC|427 BC]] *[[:en:367 BC|367 BC]] *[[:en:307 BC|307 BC]] *[[:en:247 BC|247 BC]] *[[:en:187 BC|187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[:en:67 BC|67 BC]] *[[:en:7 BC|7 BC]] | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *[[:en:1974 AD|1974 AD]] | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houttier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ìng]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[hak:Kap-yìm]][[ja:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[vi:Giáp Dần]][[za:Gyapyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Kap-în]][[zh_yue:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houttier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ìng]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[hak:Kap-yìm]][[ja:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[vi:Giáp Dần]][[za:Gyapyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Kap-în]][[zh_yue:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houttier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ìng]][[de:Holz-Tiger]][[hak:Kap-yìm]][[ja:甲寅]][[ko:갑인]][[vi:Giáp Dần]][[za:Gyapyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-în]][[zh-yue:甲寅]][[zh:甲寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904409]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *[[:en:787 BC|787 BC]] *[[:en:727 BC|727 BC]] *[[:en:667 BC|667 BC]] *[[:en:607 BC|607 BC]] *[[:en:547 BC|547 BC]] *[[:en:487 BC|487 BC]] *[[:en:427 BC|427 BC]] *[[:en:367 BC|367 BC]] *[[:en:307 BC|307 BC]] *[[:en:247 BC|247 BC]] *[[:en:187 BC|187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[:en:67 BC|67 BC]] *[[:en:7 BC|7 BC]] | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *[[:en:1974 AD|1974 AD]] | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *[[:en:787 BC|787 BC]] *[[:en:727 BC|727 BC]] *[[:en:667 BC|667 BC]] *[[:en:607 BC|607 BC]] *[[:en:547 BC|547 BC]] *[[:en:487 BC|487 BC]] *[[:en:427 BC|427 BC]] *[[:en:367 BC|367 BC]] *[[:en:307 BC|307 BC]] *[[:en:247 BC|247 BC]] *[[:en:187 BC|187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[:en:67 BC|67 BC]] *[[:en:7 BC|7 BC]] | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *[[:en:1974 AD|1974 AD]] | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *[[:en:787 BC|787 BC]] *[[:en:727 BC|727 BC]] *[[:en:667 BC|667 BC]] *[[:en:607 BC|607 BC]] *[[:en:547 BC|547 BC]] *[[:en:487 BC|487 BC]] *[[:en:427 BC|427 BC]] *[[:en:367 BC|367 BC]] *[[:en:307 BC|307 BC]] *[[:en:247 BC|247 BC]] *[[:en:187 BC|187 BC]] *[[:en:127 BC|127 BC]] *[[:en:67 BC|67 BC]] *[[:en:7 BC|7 BC]] | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *[[:en:1974 AD|1974 AD]] | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7 / [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - [[:en:1854 Tōkai earthquake|Ansei Tōkai earthquake]], [[:en:1854 Nankai earthquake|Ansei Nankai earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|WD=Q1086583|lt=787 BC}} *{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|WD=Q1086577|lt=727 BC}} *{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|WD=Q255157|lt=667 BC}} *{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|WD=Q247615|lt=607 BC}} *{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|WD=Q243539|lt=547 BC}} *{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|WD=Q237230|lt=487 BC}} *{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|WD=Q79761|lt=427 BC}} *{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|WD=Q83263|lt=367 BC}} *{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|WD=Q80846|lt=307 BC}} *{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|WD=Q35767|lt=247 BC}} *{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|WD=Q46279|lt=187 BC}} *{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|WD=Q47445|lt=127 BC}} *{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|WD=Q41334|lt=67 BC}} *{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|WD=Q40915|lt=7 BC}} | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|WD=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD}} | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}}

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|WD=Q1086583|lt=787 BC}} *{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|WD=Q1086577|lt=727 BC}} *{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|WD=Q255157|lt=667 BC}} *{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|WD=Q247615|lt=607 BC}} *{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|WD=Q243539|lt=547 BC}} *{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|WD=Q237230|lt=487 BC}} *{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|WD=Q79761|lt=427 BC}} *{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|WD=Q83263|lt=367 BC}} *{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|WD=Q80846|lt=307 BC}} *{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|WD=Q35767|lt=247 BC}} *{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|WD=Q46279|lt=187 BC}} *{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|WD=Q47445|lt=127 BC}} *{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|WD=Q41334|lt=67 BC}} *{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|WD=Q40915|lt=7 BC}} | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|WD=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD}} | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}}

--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|WD=Q1086583|lt=787 BC}} *{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|WD=Q1086577|lt=727 BC}} *{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|WD=Q255157|lt=667 BC}} *{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|WD=Q247615|lt=607 BC}} *{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|WD=Q243539|lt=547 BC}} *{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|WD=Q237230|lt=487 BC}} *{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|WD=Q79761|lt=427 BC}} *{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|WD=Q83263|lt=367 BC}} *{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|WD=Q80846|lt=307 BC}} *{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|WD=Q35767|lt=247 BC}} *{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|WD=Q46279|lt=187 BC}} *{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|WD=Q47445|lt=127 BC}} *{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|WD=Q41334|lt=67 BC}} *{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|WD=Q40915|lt=7 BC}} | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|WD=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD}} | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|WD=Q1086583|lt=787 BC}} *{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|WD=Q1086577|lt=727 BC}} *{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|WD=Q255157|lt=667 BC}} *{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|WD=Q247615|lt=607 BC}} *{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|WD=Q243539|lt=547 BC}} *{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|WD=Q237230|lt=487 BC}} *{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|WD=Q79761|lt=427 BC}} *{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|WD=Q83263|lt=367 BC}} *{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|WD=Q80846|lt=307 BC}} *{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|WD=Q35767|lt=247 BC}} *{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|WD=Q46279|lt=187 BC}} *{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|WD=Q47445|lt=127 BC}} *{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|WD=Q41334|lt=67 BC}} *{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|WD=Q40915|lt=7 BC}} | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|WD=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD}} | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wu Xing|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoe-tora Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]] *[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]] *[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]] *{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|WD=Q1086583|lt=787 BC}} *{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|WD=Q1086577|lt=727 BC}} *{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|WD=Q255157|lt=667 BC}} *{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|WD=Q247615|lt=607 BC}} *{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|WD=Q243539|lt=547 BC}} *{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|WD=Q237230|lt=487 BC}} *{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|WD=Q79761|lt=427 BC}} *{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|WD=Q83263|lt=367 BC}} *{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|WD=Q80846|lt=307 BC}} *{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|WD=Q35767|lt=247 BC}} *{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|WD=Q46279|lt=187 BC}} *{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|WD=Q47445|lt=127 BC}} *{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|WD=Q41334|lt=67 BC}} *{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|WD=Q40915|lt=7 BC}} | *[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]] *[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]] *[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]] *[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]] *[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]] *[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]] *[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]] *[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]] *[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]] *[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]] *[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]] *[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]] *[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]] *[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]] *[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]] *[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]] | *[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]] *[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]] *[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]] *[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]] *[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]] *[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]] *[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]] *[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]] *[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]] *[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]] *[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]] *[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]] *[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]] *[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]] *[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]] *[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]] *{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|WD=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD}} | *[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]] *[[2094 AD]] *[[2154 AD]] *[[2214 AD]] *[[2274 AD]] *[[2334 AD]] *[[2394 AD]] *[[2454 AD]] *[[2514 AD]] *[[2574 AD]] *[[2634 AD]] *[[2694 AD]] *[[2754 AD]] *[[2814 AD]] *[[2874 AD]] *[[2934 AD]] *[[2994 AD]] |}
=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}}
