=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Tiger also known as Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
<!-- == * Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえとら (kinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: こういん (kōin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Tiger== After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.
Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

=== Events === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|WD=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|WD=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>
==Months of Yang Wood Tiger== In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).
==Days of Yang Wood Tiger== === Selected Days === Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}
